title: Scleromitrion rigidum
taxonomy: Scleromitrion rigidum is a species of plant in the family Poaceae. It is a type of grass that belongs to the tribe Eragrostideae. This species is native to various parts of the world, including tropical and subtropical regions. Scleromitrion rigidum is often found growing in moist to wet environments. Its classification is further supported by its morphological characteristics, which distinguish it from other related species.
